steps.title: Use slope-intercept form
steps.content:
A linear function with slope $m$ and $y$-intercept $b$ has the form
$$
f(x)=mx+b
$$

steps.title: Substitute the values
steps.content: The slope is $\frac{1}{3}$. Since the graph passes through $(0,7)$, the $y$-intercept is $7$: $$ f(x)=\frac{1}{3}x+7 $$ The answer is A.
